hooks.command: f=$(node -e "process.stdin.resume();let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).tool_input.file_path||'')}catch(e){console.log('')}})"); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) { npm run typecheck; npm run lint; } 2>&1 | tail -40 ;; esac; true

f=$(node -e "process.stdin.resume();let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).tool_input.file_path||'')}catch(e){console.log('')}})"); case "$f" in *.env.local|*firestore.rules) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Arquivo sensivel (segredo Firebase ou regra de seguranca) - confirme antes de editar."}}' ;; esac
